verdict.evidence: The summary is largely faithful to the source. The only notable discrepancy is the attribution of the report to 'The Finnish Ministry of Defence,' which is not stated in the source. The source does not specify who issued the report. This is an unsupported addition/inference rather than a direct contradiction of any source statement. All other details — the detection of objects, the F/A-18 deployment, the two drone crash locations, the police securing the areas, the Häkkänen quote, and the joint investigation — accurately reflect the source.
